session.user: Run `ty check src/ packages/ tests/` in /home/runner/work/erk/erk and report all errors. Do NOT modify any files.
session.assistant: I'll run the type checker on the specified directories and report all errors.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/ packages/ tests/
Run type checker on src/, packages/, and tests/

session.assistant:
**Type checking passed:** No errors found in `src/`, `packages/`, or `tests/` directories.
All type checks are clean. The codebase passes PyRight type verification.
